since_last: 59% of 99 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.07%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 59% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC +1.73% · Gold -0.52% · Nasdaq100 +1.62%. 59% of 99 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.07%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.07%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -1.18%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DV is the standout at -7.08%
cards.body: Leaders: META +3.81%, NOW +2.17%, BABA +1.99%, WDAY +1.92%, PATH +1.78%. Laggards: DV -7.08%, INTC -2.84%, LRCX -2.64%, AMAT -2.45%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.64% at $151.18
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.64% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
